description.overview: An ancient breed that comes in multiple sizes (Klein and Mittel), German Spitz are alert watchdogs with a foxlike face and fluffy coat.
description.history: The German Spitz originated in Germany.
description.temperament: Known for being attentive, lively, devoted.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, stand-off double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An ancient breed that comes in multiple sizes (Klein and Mittel), German Spitz are alert watchdogs with a foxlike face and fluffy coat.
